zh.lifeSummary: Serlo de Grendon是Turstin de Grendon的兒子，於大約1135年出生在英國斯塔福爾利可。他於大約1152年與Margaret FitzRalph在英國斯塔福爾格林登結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1203年在英國英格蘭德比夏爾沙德洛福享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Serlo de Grendon是Turstin de Grendon的儿子，于大约1135年出生在英国斯塔福爾利可。他于大约1152年与Margaret FitzRalph在英国斯塔福爾格林登结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1203年在英国英格兰德比夏爾沙德洛福享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grendon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Grendon (in Witheridge and in Tavistock, Devon), Grendon (Northants, Warwicks), Grendon Underwood (Bucks), Grendon Bishop, Grendon Warren (Herefs), or Grindon (Durham, Northumb, Staffs).

nameMeanings.name: Serlo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mario, Arturo, Jesus, Luis, Raul, Adan, Adela, Agustin, Azucena, Baldemar, Dalila.  Italian Aldo, Angelo, Carlo, Santo, Vito, Antonio, Carmela, Elvio, Enrico, Franco, Grazia, Mauro.

Italian and Spanish: nickname from Italian and medieval Spanish merlo ‘blackbird’ (from Latin merula). In the Middle Ages this bird seems to have been regarded at times as foolish and gullible, and at other times as cunning and wily. In some cases the surname may have arisen as a metonymic occupational name for a bird catcher. See also Merle 1.

variants.name: Merola
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Marco, Sal, Alfonse, Guido, Lorenzo, Pasquale, Salvatore, Antonio, Carlo, Fiore.
Italian (southern): nickname from Neapolitan merula ‘female blackbird’, from Latin merula (see Merlo ).

variants.name: Merli
meanings: Probably a contracted form of Meriel , but also associated with the small class of girls' names derived from birds, since it is identical in form with Old French merle ‘blackbird’ (Latin merula). The name came to public notice in the 1930s with the actress Merle Oberon ( 1911–79 , born Estelle Merle O'Brien Thompson ).

variants.name: Merle
meanings: Probably a contracted form of Meriel , but also associated with the small class of girls' names derived from birds, since it is identical in form with Old French merle ‘blackbird’ (Latin merula). The name came to public notice in the 1930s with the actress Merle Oberon ( 1911–79 , born Estelle Merle O'Brien Thompson ).

variants.name: Merlos
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Fidel, Francisco, Jorge, Juan, Lazaro, Manuel, Miguel, Adelso, Alonso, Ana, Angel, Cesar.
Spanish and Portuguese: from the personal name Merlos (see Merlo ).

en.lifeSummary: Serlo de Grendon was born about 1135, in Leek, Staffordshire, England as the son of Turstin de Grendon. He married Margaret FitzRalph about 1152, in Grindon, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1203, in Shardlow, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Serlo de Grendon est né environ 1135, à Leek, Staffordshire, Angleterre, fils de Turstin de Grendon. Il a épousé Margaret FitzRalph environ 1152, à Grindon, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1203, à Shardlow, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Serlo de Grendon wurde um 1135 in Leek, Staffordshire, England, als Sohn von Turstin de Grendon geboren. Er hat um 1152 in Grindon, Staffordshire, England Margaret FitzRalph geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1203 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Shardlow, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Serlo de Grendon è nato il circa 1135 nel Leek, Staffordshire, England come figlio di Turstin de Grendon. Lui sposato Margaret FitzRalph circa 1152, nel Grindon, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1203, nel Shardlow, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Serlo de Grendonは約1135年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアリークでTurstin de Grendonの息子として生まれた。約1152年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアグリンドンでMargaret FitzRalphと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1203年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアシャルドロウで69歳で死去した。

ko.Egginton, Burton upon Trent St Modwen, D: 영국 더비실르 버턴 업 트렌트 스트 모드웬
ko.lifeSummary: Serlo de Grendon(은)는 대략 1135년 영국 스태퍼드실르 리크에서 Turstin de Grendon의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1152년 영국 스태퍼드실르 그린던에서 Margaret FitzRalph(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1203년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 샤르들로에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Serlo de Grendon nasceu aproximadamente 1135, em Leek, Staffordshire, Inglaterra filho de Turstin de Grendon. Ele casou-se com Margaret FitzRalph aproximadamente 1152, em Grindon, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1203, em Shardlow, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos.

ru.Egginton, Burton upon Trent St Modwen, D: буртон упон трент ст модвен, дирбишир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Serlo de Grendon родился около 1135 г. в местности лик, стаффордшир, Англия. Его отца звали Turstin de Grendon. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret FitzRalph около 1152 г. в местности гриндон, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1203 г. в местности шардлоу, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет.

Murió en 1203, en Shardlow, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años.
